column6:
CFMR1 but with FIL Lk10092 key removed!

From Ethos (legacy):
NOTES FOR BUILDING THE CONFIGURATION:

For Fidelity MFC App Support:
   CardTypesApps[CT_MF_CLASSIC] = CA_MFC_FIDELITY

Default MFC Sector = 2
    OppSetting[MFC_APP_INDEX] = 0x0102


Two keys needed for MFC authentication:
    Fidelity_MFC:KA2            (BLE_MFC_KEYSET, 
                                              KEY2_OFFSET)
    Fidelity_MFC:KA2_XOR   (USER_APP_K1_K2_KEYSET,
                                              KEY1_OFFSET)

Fidelity MFC App ( MFC Sector = 2, Diversification Enabled)


Reverse red and green OSDP LED commands:
OPT_AUG, LED_OPTIONS_2_INDEX, OSDP_REVERSE_RED_GREEN_LED_MASK
